# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ArtifactURL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'DestinationServer', defaultValue: '', description: 'Destination server for deployment')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifact = sh(script: "wget -O artifact.zip ${params.ArtifactURL}", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    echo "Artifact downloaded to artifact.zip"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh(script: """
                        ssh ${params.DestinationServer} 'mkdir -p /var/www/html/deploy'
                        scp artifact.zip user@${params.DestinationServer}:/var/www/html/deploy
                        ssh ${params.DestinationServer} 'cd /var/www/html/deploy && unzip artifact.zip && rm artifact.zip'
                    """)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo 'Artifact deployed successfully!'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Failed to deploy artifact.'
        }
    }
}
